surface: real Playwright browser against a clean Astro preview build
target: Rethinking Aquifer Characterization: Insights from Lagging Models

desktop.invocation: set viewport 1440x1000; open Publications; click the unique target Play control; seek to the method scene; pause for visual inspection

captions.label: English captions
captions.visualResult: no native caption overlay obscures the in-frame Manim labels

mobile.invocation: set viewport 390x844; center the target publication card; seek to 63.5 seconds; pause for visual inspection

captions.label: English captions
captions.visualResult: no duplicate native subtitle line covers the scientific animation

caption_enablement_probe.action: set the target text track to showing at 60 seconds, inspect it, then restore disabled mode
caption_enablement_probe.activeCue_observed: Four parameters are fitted by trust-region-reflective least squares; each well estimate averages a support volume.

browser_playback_verdict: pass: finite duration, positive dimensions, no media error, no horizontal overflow, captions available on demand without default overlap
